metadata.title: Alexandros Gkiafis — Custom Websites for Greek businesses
metadata.description: Custom-coded websites, e-shops, and systems in Next.js for small Greek businesses. Athens.
metadata.ogDescription: Custom-coded websites and custom systems for Greek businesses.

hero.h1: Custom websites for businesses that want something of their own.
hero.sub: Sites, e-shops and custom systems in Next.js. Designed to stand out, built to last.

howIWork.title: Three steps, no surprises.
howIWork.step1Body: Before anything else, I want to understand your business. Often the right solution isn't the one you had in mind — and we find it together.
howIWork.step2Body: I send 1-2 mockups before we lock in pricing. That way you know exactly what you're getting and we avoid surprises.
howIWork.step3Body: Built in Next.js and React — fast on mobile, optimized for Google. Hosting and minor changes included for the first year.

services.title: What I can build.
services.card1Body: From custom-coded business sites to full online stores with checkout and order management.
services.card2Body: Local search, on-page optimization, structure. When people search for your service in your area, they find you.
services.card3Body: Online ordering, appointment booking, digital menus, dashboards. Anything that automates your workflow.
services.footer: Every project different. Send a message for a quote →

contact.p: 30-minute chat, at your place or on a call. No commitment.
contact.whatsappGreeting: Hi Alex, I'm interested in your services.
